headline: Inflation Data, Oracle Earnings: What to Watch Next Week
summary: Next week brings a slate of potentially market-moving events, with inflation data front and center. Wednesday's consumer-price index and Friday's personal-consumption expenditures index will offer the Federal Reserve two new reads on price pressures.

raw.headline: Inflation Data, Oracle Earnings: What to Watch Next Week
raw.summary: Next week brings a slate of potentially market-moving events, with inflation data front and center. Wednesday's consumer-price index and Friday's personal-consumption expenditures index will offer the Federal Reserve two new reads on price pressures.

headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
summary: Economist Heather Long says the U.S. economy is diverging into three tiers of consumer behavior instead of two, amid an ongoing affordability crisis.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Dollar General, Raises Price Target to $132
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Peter Keith   maintains Dollar General (NYSE:DG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $129 to $132.
